name: tachyon_image_generate
description: Generate AI images using the Tachyon Platform image generation API via the `tachyon image generate` CLI command. Supports multiple models (gpt-image-1.5, grok-2-image, gemini-2.0-flash-exp-image-generation), sizes, and output destinations (local file or Tachyon Storage).

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate

output.description: Local file path to save the generated image. For multiple images, a numeric suffix is appended (e.g. output_1.png, output_2.png).

storage.description: Upload the generated image to Tachyon Storage and return a storage key and public URL

cli_command.example: tachyon image generate --prompt "hero image for SaaS product" --model gpt-image-1.5 --quality high --output hero.png
